resources.string: Sha kwagh u
Kwagh u App la
Temperature u %1$s la ngu eren tom sha mlu wou u %2$s la
Alert u atetan?
Iyenge i ior mba sha ashighe cii
Itinekwagh i App
avg
Icintan: Aluer u er kwagh u i nger sha heen ne yô, alaghga bateri wou una vihi fese je hemba er u vanden eren la
Widget u ken jime u tsuan kala
Aeren
Kala mba sha inja
U soon yô: URL u i soo la
URL u i ver la ngu ga, shin ngu gbilin. U ngu a za nyôr ken settings u seer URL u u soo la
Itinekwagh i Dark
URL u %1$s la lu gbilin, shi nenge sha faile wou u %2$s la shi hide nôngo
Delete Data cii man cir tom
Gbilin
Isholio!
Hanma Miniti 5 cii
Hanma Miniti 10 cii
Hanma Sekonde 10 cii
Hanma Miniti 15 cii
Hanma Miniti 30 cii
Hanma Sekonde 30 cii
Hanma Sekonde 60 cii
Hanma Ihwa
Ka i lu u a zua a kwagh u %1$s la vea kwagh u %2$s la ga
I er tom sha kwagh u i tsengan veren la ga
I er tom a faile u %1$s la ga
Ka u eren tom sha kwagh u mlu u ahumbe u a lu hen server wou la vough ga, hemban je yô, kwagh u %1$s
Widget u tsuan kala u ken hemen
Nyôr a URL u %1$s la
Kighir Mlu u Imegh
Peeji u tsenganfan
Fa akper
Hanmasev
Shighe u i tsengan fan kwagh u una va er la (aluer ngu sha mi yô)
Kwagh u tsengan fan ’%1$s’ ngu vough ga, nenge ken faile u akaa a u ver la man hide nôngo
URL u i tsengan veren la ngu ga, ver un ken %1$s
Kwaghyan u Hamburger
ihwa
ahwa
Me Sor Kwagh ne shi Me Hide Nôngo
Tese Akaa a Ôron ken Iyou?
I sôr app ne kpa server u u lu eren tom a mi la gema sôr Inigo Plugin u weeWX la ga. Alaghga ajiir aa kera tese tsembelee ga zan zan a kar sôron weeWX
Ahwa 3
Ahwa 6
Ahwa 12
Hanmasev
Ahwa ahar
Shighe u sôron akaa la ngu vough ga, hide sôr akaa a i ver la man hide nôngo
%1$s la hegen gba u a zua a %2$s data file hen %3$s server, gba u u sôr %4$s shi u sôr %5$s cii ve app ne una er tom vough ye. Klik Ok sha u zuan a akaa agen sha %6$s
Iyenge i ior mba ken uwer u u kar la
Iyenge i ior mba ken inyom i i kar la
Itinekwagh i Iwanger
U hiden sôron akaa sha ave
I ver akaa a hiden sôron sha ave, kende sha jingi i hiden sôron akaa sha u wan akaa ker
App u zuan
U er tom a Metric kpa?
miniti
Temperature u %1$s la ngu sha ityough ki %2$s
Msen u sha use?
Akaa a a er ken uwer u u dondo la kpa?
Ei
I ver kwagh u danlood shin app môm ga
Ian i nan kwagh
Ka i gba u a na u abaver sha u tan we icin shighe u mlu u ahumbe, ura u nôôn shin mlu u ura u nôôn la a kom sha mlu u u ver la yô
Er u venda ian i eren kwagh u u soo la kwa har nahan, gba u u er kwagh ne ken akaa a u ver la, u gema u hii akaa a u ver la kpa?
Ok
We a rumun yô, kegh shighe u se lu nengen sha URL u u tindi a mi la yô

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: I nenge a mbamshi mba %1$d ken faile u %2$s la, nenge faile u %2$s u i zough a mi hen %3$s la shin nenge %4$s logs sha u fan kwagh u a lu ken faile la vighe vighe yô
I nenge a mbamshi mba %1$d ken faile u %2$s la, nenge faile u %2$s u i zough a mi hen %3$s la shin nenge %4$s logs sha u fan kwagh u a lu ken faile la vighe vighe yô
I nenge a kwaghbo u %1$d ken faile u %2$s la, nenge faile u %2$s u i zough a mi hen %3$s la shin nenge %4$s logs sha u fan kwagh u a lu ken faile la vighe vighe yô
I nenge a mbamshi mba %1$d ken faile u %2$s la, nenge faile u %2$s u i zough a mi hen %3$s la shin nenge %4$s logs sha u fan kwagh u a lu ken faile la vighe vighe yô
I nenge a mbamshi mba %1$d ken faile u %2$s la, nenge faile u %2$s u i zough a mi hen %3$s la shin nenge %4$s logs sha u fan kwagh u a lu ken faile la vighe vighe yô
I nenge a mbamshi mba %1$d ken faile u %2$s la, nenge faile u %2$s u i zough a mi hen %3$s la shin nenge %4$s logs sha u fan kwagh u a lu ken faile la vighe vighe yô

resources.string: Rada
Ka u danlood foto u radar la ga
Radar foto ngu eren tom her
Radar u ’%1$s’ ngu vough ga, nenge ken faile wou u akaa a u ver la man hide nôngo
URL u radar la ngu ga. U ngu a za hen settings u geman
Sha jingi i vesen:
Ka nyi i lu Inch?
Ka nyi i lu mlu u ura?
Ka a ta u icin ayange ayange aluer ura u nôô kuma er u ver la yô
Ura u nôôn %1$s la zua sha mlu wou u %2$s la
Mlu u uraahumbe
Mlu u ura u nôôn
Ka nyi i lu mlu u mngerem ma vihin tsung?
Ka i ta se icin aluer ura hemba mlu u i ver la sha shighe u ura u lu nôôn la
Ura u nôôn sha %1$s ken %2$d %3$s u a kar la kuma sha mlu u ’Severe’
Icintan sha kwagh u uraahumbe u vihin tsung
Mlu u uraahumbe
Icintan i Rainrate la kpa?
Ka i ta icin aluer ura hemba mlu u i ver la sha mlu u shighe u ura u lu nôôn la
Ura u nôôn sha %1$s ken %2$d %3$s u a kar la kuma sha mlu u ’Icintan’
Icintan sha kwagh u uraahumbe
Nenge ase kwagh u Rainrate kpa?
Ka i ta se icin aluer ura hemba shighe u i ver ér ura u nôô la yô
Ura u %1$s ken %2$d %3$s u a kar la kuma sha mlu u ’Nenge’
Nenge ase kwagh u mngerem ma deemee
Tsua shighe u hiden sôron akaa
U soo u dughun akaa a u lu a mi la cii kera kpa?
Sav akaa a i nger sha kwagh u app la
Save akaa a u ver la
Hide za hen akaa a u ver la
Tese kwagh u i tsengan ôron la
Tese Radar
Ashen je
Aver
Iyenge i ior
M ngu danlood kwagh u i tsengan veren la her
M ngu danlood kwagh u mlu u ahumbe her
Swipe Lock
Mlu u Mzough
Iyol tseen
Ka i ta icin zan zan kwa har ken iyange zum u mlu u ahumbe a kom sha mlu u u ver la yô
Kwagh u tesen mlu u ahumbe
Iyenge i ior mba ken uwer ne
Iyenge i Mbahemenev mba Shin Itine
Nyian
Iyenge i Mbahemenev mba Shin Itine
Kwaghbo u i fe un ga er
Ka sha Wi-Fi tseegh u lu eren tom a mi ye?
Ver sha u hiden sôron akaa sha ave, kpa kwagh ngu u i koso ga
Update shighe u u lu eren tom la
I ver URL sha mlu u hiihii la shin lu gbilin
U er tom a ashighe a sôron akaa vough vough
I kera fatyo u zuan shin danlood sha URL u i tese la ga
Yange m kera fatyo u zuan shin danlood kwagh u i tsengan veren la ga
Ka m zua a ian i eren tom a %1$s sha %2$s ga
Ka i lu u a zua a mi shin a danlood kwagh sha %1$s ga
Ka m kera zua a foto u radar= sha Intanet ga
Yange m kera fatyo u zuan shin danlood akaa a i ver sha server wou ga
U fatyo u zuan shin danlood foto u webcam sha server wou ga
Fam
Webcam
Shighe u hiden sôron Webcam
Foto u i yer ér Webcam la ngu duen her
URL u Webcam la ngu gbilin ga shin ngu gbilin
Itinekwagh i Widget
Yange ma i hide i sôr kpa Wi-Fi ngu ga
Iyenge i nyian
